question_description: <query> ASK WHERE { ?k property:country resource:Mexico . ?k property:elevation_above_the_sea_level resource:1147.0 } </query> <answer> Yes </answer>
question_text: Is it possible to locate a site in Mexico that is 1147 meters above sea level?

question_description: <query> ASK WHERE { ?k property:elevation_above_the_sea_level resource:1147.0 . ?k property:country resource:Germany } </query> <answer> No </answer>
question_text: In Germany as well?

question_description: <query> SELECT DISTINCT ?w WHERE { FILTER ( CONTAINS ( LCASE ( ?e ) , 'miracle' ) ) . ?e property:runtime resource:54.56 . ?e rdf:type ontology:compilation__album . ?e property:preceded_by ?w } </query> <answer> Pools of Light (Brian Kelly album) </answer>
question_text: Which album was released just before the 54 min long compilation album "something miracle"?

question_description: <query> ASK WHERE { resource:Expect_a_Miracle property:artist resource:Brian_Kelly_(composer_&_pianist) } </query> <answer> Yes </answer>
question_text: Was Expect a Miracle composed by Brian Kelly?
